name: deep-work
description: Evidence-Driven Development Protocol — Codex CLI port of claude-deep-work v6.4.1 (B-α scope)

interface.longDescription: Codex CLI plugin that drives a 6-phase auto-flow (Brainstorm → Research → Plan → Implement → Test → Integrate) with TDD enforcement, receipt validation, and parallel subagent dispatch via multi_agent. Requires features.multi_agent = true AND features.codex_hooks = true in ~/.codex/config.toml. First run will prompt to install hooks into <repo>/.codex/hooks.json (A' First-Run Install Pattern, OI-11).
defaultPrompt: $deep-work:deep-work-orchestrator "task description" 로 자동 워크플로우 시작 (multi_agent + codex_hooks feature flags 필요)
